name: Support guest access policy example
answer:
Workspace owners can invite guest collaborators from workspace settings.
Guest collaborators keep access for 90 days.
Support automatically converts every guest collaborator to a full member.

sources.title: Support Guest Access Policy
sources.content:
Workspace owners can invite guest collaborators from workspace settings.
Guest collaborators keep access for 30 days unless the owner removes them sooner.
Guest collaborators remain guests unless a workspace owner approves a member conversion.
